markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review and align on the proposed content strategy and topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **Strategy Approved:** The 5 topic clusters were approved, with a key modification to Cluster \#4 (Data Engineering) to focus on enabling self-serve for analysts, not just engineers.
  - **Urgent Priority:** Cluster \#5 (Shadow AI) will be prioritized, with articles from all clusters published concurrently to accelerate impact.
  - [**Content Pipeline:** The strategy uses foundational, less technical content to bypass the current review bottleneck and enable a 5 articles/week publishing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [**AI Visibility:** The Scrunch dashboard shows a 2% citation rate vs. competitors' 10%, highlighting a major opportunity for content to influence LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Current Content Bottlenecks

  - [**Goal:** Shift from expensive paid social to an organic content flywheel for traffic and users, and improve AI search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Current content is too technical, creating a review bottleneck that slows publishing momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Performance:** The blog has low organic impact; 10 articles drive most traffic, with keywords ranking on pages 3-4.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [**Gaps:**](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [AI & analytics keywords](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [Competitive comparisons (listicles, vs. articles)](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
      - [Jobs-to-be-done and top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)

### Solution: 5-Cluster Content Strategy

  - [**Approach:** A topic cluster model to build authority and avoid a "spray and pray" approach.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Prioritize foundational, less technical content to bypass the review bottleneck and enable a 5 articles/week publishing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [**The 5 Clusters:**](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
    1.  **Competitor Alternatives & Comparisons:**
          - [**Goal:** Influence LLM responses and provide a clear narrative on Hex's differentiation.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
          - [**Format:** Listicles, "vs." articles, and "alternatives to" pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
    2.  **AI & Data Analytics:**
          - [**Goal:** Capture high-volume keywords and link to existing thought leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
          - [**Scope:** Top-of-funnel explainers to middle-of-funnel specifics.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
    3.  **Modern Data Viz & BI:**
          - [**Goal:** Capture keywords from Tableau/Databricks and reframe Hex for business users.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)
          - [**Focus:** Highlight features like Data Apps, Threads, and Embedded Analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)
    4.  **Data Engineering & Infrastructure:**
          - [**Goal:** Capture keywords from Databricks/Google Cloud (e.g., reverse ETL, data lakehouses).](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
          - [**Modification:** Focus on enabling self-serve for analysts/scientists, not just engineers.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
          - [**Focus:** The Notebooks product.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
    5.  **Shadow AI & Data Trust:**
          - [**Goal:** Position Threads and Data Apps as solutions for shadow AI and poor governance.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
          - [**Scope:** Foundational explainers and governance best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)

### Implementation & Measurement

  - [**Featured Images:**](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
      - [**Process:** growthx.ai will generate images using GPT-5, styled to brand guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
      - [**Action:** A meeting with brand design lead Annie will align on the process and volume.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)
  - [**Scrunch Dashboard (AI Visibility):**](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Tracks LLM visibility by running prompts against models (Perplexity, ChatGPT).](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
      - [**Finding:** Hex has a 2% citation rate vs. competitors' 10%, indicating a major opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=2083.0)
      - [**Insight:** Blog content drives the most LLM referral traffic, confirming the strategy's value.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=2175.0)
  - [**Looker Dashboard (SEO Performance):**](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)
      - [**Purpose:** A 7-page report tracking GA4 and GSC data.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)
      - [**Features:** LLM referral traffic, cohort analysis by topic cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**growthx.ai:**](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=2347.0)
      - [Conduct keyword research for the 5 clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=2347.0)
      - [Present a content calendar (50–80 ideas) next week.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
      - [Share the Airtable keyword gap analysis doc.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=2370.0)
  - [**Client Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=2411.0)
      - [Review and comment on all Notion artifacts (Company Context, Personas, Guidelines).](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=2430.0)
      - [Share internal competitor analysis docs with Aida (`growthx.labs` email).](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=2370.0)
      - [Schedule a meeting with brand design lead Annie to align on the featured image process.](https://fathom.video/share/GjPziB4BRJmrYsEQP_sZPNfheyQLtxtF?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)
